title: Mixture of Experts, Live
tagline: Why Mixtral and DeepSeek-MoE scale parameters without scaling compute
summary: Train four linear experts and a softmax gate jointly on a piecewise 2D regression in your browser. Watch the gate carve the input plane into four regions, each expert specialise in its region, and the load-balancing auxiliary loss prevent dead experts. Toggle between soft mixture and top-1 routing.
highlights: Live joint training of 4 experts + a gating network on a piecewise plane.
Toggle soft mixture vs top-1 hard routing — see how sparse experts specialise.
Add the load-balancing auxiliary loss with one click; watch dead experts wake up.
Plane visualisation of expert ownership regions with prediction error overlay.
